text:
Now the disconnect should work properly. I've:

1. Imported `useDisconnect` directly from wagmi
2. Used `wagmiDisconnect()` (which is the disconnect function from the hook)
3. Kept the toast message "Wallet disconnected"
4. Removed the mixed state from `useWallet` to avoid conflicts

The disconnect button will now properly disconnect the wallet and show the toast message. When disconnected, the UI will show the "Connect Wallet" button.
